title: Meeting Action Items
problem: Teams leave meetings without clear ownership or deadlines, causing follow-up drift and repeated discussions that slow product delivery.
solution: The assistant converts transcripts and notes into deduplicated action items with owner placeholders, due dates, dependencies, and a concise decision log ready for tracker sync.

impact.notes: Targeting PM, design, and engineering rituals; expected to cut coordination overhead by two follow-up messages per meeting.
